It’s the culture as well. The dress code here in Melbourne isn’t compulsory either, however most people enjoy dressing.

Girls spend their money on nice dresses instead of designer handbags. Western girls are more attractive than Hong Kong girls not just because they’re better looking, but also because they spend more time and more willing to dress up appropriately for occasions.

I noticed most girls in hk don’t even wear skirts. I might be wrong tho as I was only in hk for a few days.

It’s the culture as well. The dress code here in Melbourne isn’t compulsory either, however most people enjoy dressing.

Girls spend their money on nice dresses instead of designer handbags. Western girls are more attractive than Hong Kong girls not just because they’re better looking, but also because they spend more time and more willing to dress up appropriately for occasions.

I noticed most girls in hk don’t even wear skirts. I might be wrong tho as I was only in hk for a few days.
